title: Release Channel Pointer (v1)
description: Per-channel release pointer JSON. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bumped only on non-backwards-compatible changes; additive evolution stays at 1.

version.description: Currently published version on this channel (e.g. "0.9.0.977", "2026.1.0").

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp at which this channel was promoted to point at `version`.
